{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 4, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent provides detailed critiques of the claim-evidence linkage, identifying several areas where the evidence does not fully support the claims made.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation and suggests improvements to the writing style but does not engage deeply with the citation level.",
    "RX.1": "The agent identifies multiple overreaching claims that require further evidence, indicating a high level of uncertainty in some areas.",
    "RX.3": "The agent covers all aspects of the output, providing detailed suggestions for revisions and clarifications.",
    "RX.4": "The agent does not introduce new errors or harmful content but notes several minor regressions in the clarity and specificity of claims.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides clear annotations and suggestions for traceability, though some details are missing."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent provides detailed critiques of the claim-evidence linkage, identifying several areas where the evidence does not fully support the claims made.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation and suggests improvements to the writing style but does not engage deeply with the citation level.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identifies multiple overreaching claims that require further evidence, indicating a high level of uncertainty in some areas.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the output, providing detailed suggestions for revisions and clarifications.
rationale.RX.4: The agent does not introduce new errors or harmful content but notes several minor regressions in the clarity and specificity of claims.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides clear annotations and suggestions for traceability, though some details are missing.
